sites.context: Inside updateClassInstance — if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') { ... workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; } (new-lifecycle path, getDerivedStateFromProps present)
Inside updateClassInstance — second branch: if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') { workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; } (shouldComponentUpdate / shouldUpdate path)
Inside resumeMountClassInstance — if (typeof instance.getSnapshotBeforeUpdate === 'function') { workInProgress.flags |= Snapshot; } (resuming a previously interrupted mount)

purpose: The Snapshot flag is set on a class-component Fiber whenever the instance implements getSnapshotBeforeUpdate, scheduling the reconciler to call that lifecycle before flushing DOM mutations in the commit phase.
